product_overview: Two multi-step registration forms (Collaborators and Innovators) that collect user/company data across 4 steps each, validate with Zod schemas, upload files to S3, persist to MariaDB via Prisma, and send notification emails on successful submission.
core_goals: Allow external companies to register as Collaborators through a 4-step form (Company Info → Industry → Capabilities → Review).
Allow individuals to register as Innovators through a 4-step form (Personal Info → Project Overview → Project Details → Review).
Validate all inputs server-side using Zod schemas before persisting to the database.
Upload profile images and media files to S3-compatible storage (MinIO).
Check for duplicate email and phone numbers before creating records.
Send confirmation emails to registrants and notify admin users of new submissions.
Support admin CRUD operations (status update, delete) with RBAC-enforced permissions.
key_features: Hono-based RESTful API with FormData parsing for file uploads.
Zod server-side validation schemas for both Collaborator and Innovator registration.
S3-compatible file storage with generateKey for unique object keys.
Duplicate detection: email and phone uniqueness checks before record creation.
Prisma ORM for database operations with transaction support for Innovator creation.
Admin endpoints protected by RBAC (checkPermission) with session-based auth.
Status update (APPROVED/REJECTED) and record deletion with S3 cleanup.
Email notifications via emailService on successful registration.
Public endpoints with LRU cache (1hr TTL) for listing approved/visible records.
user_flow_summary: User navigates to /collaborators/registration/company-info and fills Step 1 (Company Info).
User proceeds through Step 2 (Industry), Step 3 (Capabilities with file uploads), and Step 4 (Review & Terms).
On submission, form data is sent as FormData to POST /api/collaborator.
Server validates with Zod, checks email/phone uniqueness, uploads files to S3, creates DB records, sends emails.
Innovator flow follows the same pattern: 4 steps → POST /api/innovators.
Admin users can list, approve/reject, and delete registrations via admin endpoints.
validation_criteria: POST /api/collaborator must validate companyName (required), email (required, valid format), primaryPhoneNumber (required, +prefix), industrialSector (enum), specialization (required).

POST /api/innovators must validate name (required), email (required, valid), phoneNumber (required, +prefix), country, city (max 100), specialization (max 200), projectTitle (required), projectDescription (required, max 1000).
Invalid image type returns 400 with code 'INVALID_IMAGE_TYPE' (innovators).
File exceeding size limit returns 400 with code 'FILE_TOO_LARGE' or 'IMAGE_TOO_LARGE'.
Invalid file type returns 400 with code 'INVALID_FILE_TYPE' (innovators).
Successful creation returns 201 with success message.
Admin status update requires authentication and returns 200.
Admin delete removes S3 objects and DB records, returns 200.

features.name: Collaborator Registration API
features.description: API for registering collaborating companies with file upload support.

features.name: Innovator Registration API
features.description: API for registering innovators with project file upload support.

400.description: Validation error, EMAIL_EXISTS, PHONE_EXISTS, INVALID_FILE_TYPE, or FILE_TOO_LARGE
